en.extract:
The red-eared fruit dove (Ramphiculus fischeri) is a species of bird in the pigeon family. It is endemic to the island of Sulawesi, Indonesia. This species was formerly placed in the genus Ptilinopus.


Distribution
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. They are found at elevations between 1,000–3,000 m (3,300–9,800 ft).


Subspecies
Three subspecies are recognised:

R. f. fischeri (Brüggemann, F, 1876) – montane forest of northern Sulawesi
R. f. centralis (Meyer, AB, 1903) – montane forest of central and southeastern Sulawesi
R. f. meridionalis (Meyer, AB & Wiglesworth, LW, 1893) – southwestern Sulawesi (Lompobattang Massif)


Status
It is listed as least concern by the IUCN although their populations are currently decreasing. 


See also
Lompobattang fruit-dove - a similar species
Fauna of Indonesia
List of least concern birds

The '''red-eared fruit dove''' ('''''Ramphiculus fischeri''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the [[Columbidae|pigeon]] family. It is [[endemic]] to the island of [[Sulawesi]], [[Indonesia]]. This species was formerly placed in the genus ''[[Ptilinopus]]''.

== Distribution ==
Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s. They are found at elevations between {{cvt|1000|-|3000|m|-2}}.<ref name=IUCN />

== Subspecies ==
Three [[subspecies]] are recognised:<ref name=avilist>{{ cite web | author=AviList Core Team | date=2025 | title=AviList: The Global Avian Checklist, v2025 | doi=10.2173/avilist.v2025 | doi-access=free | url=http://www.avilist.org/checklist/v2025/ | access-date=4 November 2025 }}</ref>
* ''R. f. fischeri'' ([[Friedrich Brüggemann|Brüggemann, F]], 1876) – montane forest of northern [[Sulawesi]]
* ''R. f. centralis'' ([[Adolf Bernhard Meyer|Meyer, AB]], 1903) – montane forest of central and southeastern [[Sulawesi]]
* ''R. f. meridionalis'' (Meyer, AB & [[Lionel William Wiglesworth|Wiglesworth, LW]], 1893) – southwestern [[Sulawesi]] (Lompobattang Massif)

== Status ==
It is listed as [[Least-concern species|least concern]] by the IUCN although their populations are currently decreasing.<ref name=IUCN /> 

== See also ==

* [[Lompobattang fruit-dove]] - a similar species
* [[Fauna of Indonesia]]
* [[List of least concern birds]]
